title: RTX EAGLE Data Source
description: A configured intelligence or logistics data source in the RTX EAGLE platform

id.description: Unique identifier for the data source

name.description: Human-readable name of the data source

type.description: Type of data source (e.g., LogisticsDB, IntelligenceDB, AnalyticsDB)

description.description: Description of data contained in this source

program.description: Defense program this data source is associated with
